name: Rep Performance & Commission
description: Know exactly what each AE earned this quarter, where their deals came from, and whether the attribution is clean enough to defend.
alsoSurfaces: How much did each AE earn this quarter, and from which deals?
Where is commission attribution disputed or unclear?
Which reps had inflated numbers from one big deal vs. consistent execution?
How does this quarter compare to last on quota attainment?
beforeWeRun: Period: current quarter, last quarter, or YTD?
Rep scope: full team or a single rep?
Attribution rule: first-credit, last-credit, or split?

whatYoullGet.name: AE leaderboard
whatYoullGet.desc: Bookings, commission earned, quota attainment per rep.

whatYoullGet.name: Commission detail
whatYoullGet.desc: Per-deal credit with attribution rule applied.

whatYoullGet.name: Disputed attributions
whatYoullGet.desc: Deals with ambiguous credit flagged for review.

whatYoullGet.name: Concentration check
whatYoullGet.desc: Whose numbers are anchored on one big deal vs. spread.

whatYoullGet.name: Cohort comparison
whatYoullGet.desc: This quarter vs. last on per-rep attainment.

callout: 3 quick inputs, then Sage builds your commission dashboard in ~9 min.
